Front-of-House Growing Display

FarmCube Nano

A compact soil-free growing display engineered for restaurants, hotels, lounges, and premium homes. Four-tier aeroponic architecture in an elegant wood-grain cabinet — grow, harvest, and display fresh ingredients at the point of service.

Overview

Fresh Growing, Beautifully Displayed

FarmCube Nano brings professional-grade aeroponic cultivation into front-of-house environments. Its premium wood-grain exterior and transparent display panels make it as much a design feature as a growing system — guests see freshness live, before their eyes.

FarmCube Nano

Fresh Growing, Beautifully Displayed

The Nano brings professional aeroponic cultivation into front-of-house spaces. Its premium wood-grain exterior and transparent display panels make it as much a design feature as a production system — guests see freshness live, before their eyes.

Four independently lit and irrigated tiers, a recirculating aeroponic system, 7-inch touchscreen control, and UV-sterilised 80 L reservoir — all in a 1,500 × 687 × 2,080 mm footprint weighing 320 kg.

🌿
Recirculating Aeroponics
Nutrient-rich mist is delivered directly to root zones and recirculated within a closed-loop system, cutting water use by up to 95% compared to conventional soil farming.
💡
Full-Spectrum Dimmable LED
LED panels spanning 400–730 nm cover the complete photosynthetically active range. Light intensity is adjustable 0–100% via 0–10 V dimming, with separate schedules per tier.
🖥️
7-inch Smart Touchscreen
Preset growing programs for different crops, real-time monitoring of water temperature, air temperature, and humidity. Supports vegetative and flowering lighting modes.
📱
App & IoT Control
Remote monitoring and control via mobile app. Clear system status indicators alert users to normal operation, warnings, and maintenance requirements.
🔬
UV Tank Sterilisation
Integrated UV sterilisation in the nutrient reservoir suppresses pathogen growth and maintains cleaner water quality throughout the growing cycle.
🪵
Front-of-House Design
Premium wood-grain finish, transparent display area, and front-access sliding trays make the Nano a natural fit for restaurants, hotel dining rooms, and premium residences.
System Architecture

What's Inside Each Tier

Each of the four growing tiers is independently lit and irrigated. The base module houses all mechanical components — water tank, pump, UV steriliser — keeping the growing area clean and accessible.

Crop Performance — Leafy Greens

8-Cell Tray · 16 Trays per Cycle · 8 Plants per Tray

Yield figures are based on full 4-tier operation using the 8-cell tray configuration for leafy greens. Harvest weights are per cycle (kg) and annualised based on grow-period cycling.

Crop Grow Period (Days) Plants / Tray Trays per Cycle Harvest / Cycle (kg) Cycles / Year Annual Yield (kg)

Loose Leaf Lettuce208162318414
Iceberg Lettuce208163016480
Kale208162717459
Frisée208162717459

Garden Parsley308162711297
Crop Performance — Microgreens

12-Punnet Tray · 192 Punnets per Cycle

Microgreen yields use the 12-punnet tray format. Annual harvest figures are expressed in punnet boxes. A light cover is used during the sprouting phase for moisture retention (reusable).

Crop Grow Period (Days) Punnets / Cycle Harvest / Cycle (Boxes) Cycles / Year Annual Yield (Boxes)
Basil Microgreen7192192479,024
Parsley Microgreen7192192479,024
Pea Sprout Microgreen7192192479,024
Red Radish Microgreen7192192479,024
Mung Bean Microgreen7192192479,024
Coriander Microgreen8192192417,872
Amaranth Microgreen9192192377,104
Carrot Microgreen10192192336,336
Dill Microgreen10192192336,336
Aeroponic Irrigation

Root-Zone Misting for 95% Less Water

The FarmCube Nano's recirculating aeroponic system delivers a fine nutrient mist directly to exposed root zones suspended within each tier's irrigation channel. Water and nutrients are recovered and recirculated in a closed loop — using up to 95% less water than soil-based cultivation while delivering pesticide-free produce.

UV sterilisation in the 80 L reservoir suppresses pathogen growth. Water level is externally visible for easy daily checks.

Applications

Foodservice & Premium Living

Restaurants, hotel lobbies, cafés, juice bars, and premium residences — the Nano's wood-grain cabinet and transparent display area make it a natural fit for any premium interior.

Restaurants
Kitchen & Service Floor
Grow herbs, leafy greens, and microgreens steps from the pass. Reduce sourcing costs, eliminate waste, and tell a freshness story guests can see.

FAQ

Common Questions

Who is FarmCube Nano designed for?

The Nano is purpose-built for front-of-house environments — restaurants, hotels, lounges, cafés, and premium homes. Its wood-grain exterior and transparent display panels are designed to be visible to guests, not hidden in a back kitchen.

What crops can I grow, and how often can I harvest?

The Nano supports herbs, leafy greens (lettuce, kale, parsley, and more), and microgreens using interchangeable 8-cell and 12-punnet trays. Fast-cycling crops like basil and radish microgreens yield up to 47 harvests per year; leafy greens average 16–18 cycles annually.

How much water does the system use?

The recirculating aeroponic system uses approximately 95% less water than conventional soil-based farming. Water is delivered as fine mist directly to root zones and returned to the 80-litre reservoir for reuse.

Does it require specialist knowledge to operate?

No. The 7-inch touchscreen features preset growing programs for different crops. The system is designed for non-specialist users — busy restaurant teams can operate it reliably without an agronomist on-site.

How is the lighting controlled?

Full-spectrum LED panels (400–730 nm) are dimmable from 0–100% via a 0–10 V analogue signal. Vegetative and flowering modes are selectable per tier, with programmable on/off schedules through the touchscreen or mobile app.

What are the installation requirements?

The Nano operates on 110–277 V / 50–60 Hz power. Water supply can be via an auto-fill pipeline connection or manual topping of the 80 L tank. The unit ships at 1,580 × 770 × 2,240 mm and weighs approximately 320 kg fully assembled.

Ready to grow at the point of service?

Contact our team for pricing, site consultation, and a tailored growing plan for your space.
